description: SpiderPublish Starter Kit — runtime + skill registry. shared/ is the source of truth; runtimes/ is emitted by scripts/build.ts.

skills.title: Build a Scroll-Linked Hero from a Video
skills.summary: Build a cinematic scroll-scrubbed hero from a video file using ffmpeg frame extraction and the sys-scroll-sequence component. Use whenever the user asks for 'cinematic scroll', 'scroll-linked hero', 'video as background animation', 'frame-by-frame hero', 'scroll-driven animation', 'Apple-style scroll hero'.

skills.title: Search the SpiderIQ Component Marketplace
skills.summary: Search the curated SpiderIQ component marketplace by kind / mood / palette / brand_fit_tags / scene_type, then insert a result into a page. Use whenever the user asks for 'a hero section', 'a CTA block', 'a pricing component', or any 'find me a section / block / component for ...' request.

skills.title: Suggest agent_meta for Marketplace Assets (LLM-Inferred)
skills.summary: Use the SpiderGate-powered marketplace_suggest_agent_meta tool to infer mood / palette / brand_fit_tags / scene_type / agent_meta for a marketplace asset (component, bg-video, site template). Two-step: suggest → review → apply via set_*_agent_meta. Use when uploading a fresh marketplace asset that needs taxonomy.

skills.title: Update a Shared Component and Propagate Across All Pages
skills.summary: Update a shared component AND repoint every consuming page's block pin in one MCP call + one confirm_token (v2.88.0+). Replaces the ~10-request choreography. Use whenever you change a component everyone is using.

skills.title: Roll Back a Shared Component to an Earlier Version
skills.summary: Restore a component to an earlier version's content. Creates a new forward version + repoints pages. Pairs with component-update-and-propagate for undo (v2.88.0+). Use whenever a component change broke pages.

skills.title: Safe Edit Loop with Preview → Confirm
skills.summary: Iterate on a page or template safely: template_preview (no state mutation) → browser-check → publish (dry_run → confirm_token). The default safe authoring loop.

skills.title: Upload a Local Directory of Files via Multipart POST
skills.summary: Upload a local directory of files directly via multipart POST. Kills the pinggy/catbox/serveo tunnel workaround. Use whenever you need to push frame sequences, image sets, or asset bundles to SpiderMedia from your local disk.

skills.title: Build a Programmatic Directory (Category / City / Listing)
skills.summary: Build /directory/{category}/{city}/{listing} pages programmatically: create category → bulk-upsert listings (or import from IDAP) → deploy. Use for SEO directories with thousands of generated pages.

skills.title: Audit Internal Links Before Deploy
skills.summary: Scan the tenant's published surface for broken internal links (404s, redirects, mistyped slugs) before deploy. Use whenever you finish authoring and want a pre-deploy sanity check.

skills.title: Migrate a Tilda / Webflow / Lovable Site to SpiderPublish
skills.summary: End-to-end migration from a Tilda export (or Webflow / Lovable export): section → component → page → publish, with auto_extract_css for one-file imports. Use whenever you're porting an existing static site into the SpiderPublish CMS.

skills.title: SpiderPublish Content Platform — Full MCP Surface
skills.summary: Full content_* / directory_* / playbook_* MCP namespace overview: pages, posts, docs, navigation, settings, components, domains, directory pages, component site-wide propagation, section overrides. Use whenever you need the full content-platform tool catalog at a glance.

skills.title: SpiderBook — Appointment-Booking MCP Surface
skills.summary: Full booking_* MCP namespace: cal.com-backed flow authoring, services, bookings, template library. Ships /book/{flow_id} route + {% booking %} Liquid tag. Use whenever the user asks for 'add appointment booking', 'calendar embed', 'scheduling flow', 'cal.com integration'.

skills.title: SpiderFlow — Multi-Step Form Authoring (GA, P1 closure)
skills.summary: Full form_* MCP namespace (GA 2026-05-14, P1 closure). 27 methods (lifecycle + step composition + logic + variables + hidden + embed + validation + locking + versioning + responses). Typeform-class multi-step forms, lead capture, NPS / CSAT surveys, intake forms. Reuses booking_flows table with kind='form' (P1.Z sentinel-business pattern — agents OMIT business_id). 17 field types, conditional logic with canonical {op, left, right?} LogicRule shape (P1.W5), structural validation, per-form locking + version restore (P1.X) with 423 Locked envelope, submissions list/get (P1.M1), embed snippet generation via embed.spideriq.ai/v1/loader.js (3 KB, inline + popup). NOT in @spideriq/mcp-publish — only in kitchen-sink @spideriq/mcp@1.14.6. Use whenever the user asks for 'a form', 'survey', 'questionnaire', 'NPS', 'lead capture', 'intake form', 'Typeform alternative'.

skills.title: Bootstrap a Form from a Seed Template
skills.summary: Bootstrap a publishable SpiderFlow form from one of 5 seeded global templates (lead-gen-quiz / contact / nps / job-application / event-rsvp) in a single agent-callable step. Takes a template slug + optional customisation deltas (rename + override field labels + override logic + override hidden field defaults) and returns a published flow_id ready to embed. Phase 11+12 dry_run/confirm_token gate is handled inside. Use whenever an agent needs to spin up a working form fast: 'add an NPS survey', 'I need a contact form', 'add a quick lead-gen quiz', 'event RSVP form', 'job application form'.

skills.title: Liquid Templates + Themes + Edge Deploy
skills.summary: template_* / content_deploy_site_* MCP surface for Liquid templates, themes, and Cloudflare edge deploy. Use whenever you need to apply a theme, override a section, or deploy to production with the Phase 11+12 readiness → preview → confirm → poll pipeline.

skills.title: SpiderMedia — Image / File / Video Upload
skills.summary: media_* MCP namespace: upload images, files, videos to the SpiderMedia CDN. Includes upload_local_file / upload_local_directory for agents with filesystem access (no tunnel required).

skills.title: AgentDocs — Versioned Documentation Projects
skills.summary: agentdocs_* MCP namespace: build versioned documentation projects (Mintlify-style) with sidebar config, MDX pages, full-text search, and edge deploy.

skills.title: Create a SpiderIQ Tenant Page
skills.summary: Create a new published page on a SpiderIQ tenant via the @spideriq/mcp-publish MCP server. Walks through reading the help reference, building the blocks[] payload (canonical block schema, no silent-accept anti-patterns), running dry_run preview → confirm, publishing, theming, and deploying. Use for any 'create a page', 'add a page', 'new landing page' request.

skills.title: Build a SpiderIQ Personalized Landing Page
skills.summary: Build a personalized landing page via /lp/{slug}/{place_id} with merge tags fed by IDAP. Walks through dynamic_landing template, merge-tag vocabulary ({{ lead.name }}, {{ lead.city }}), resolve_lead lookup, and end-to-end deploy. Use for 'a personalized outreach page', 'a /lp/ page', 'one page per business', 'cold-outreach landing'.

skills.title: Pick the Right @spideriq/mcp-* Package
skills.summary: Decide which @spideriq/mcp-* npm package to install. Use whenever the user asks '@spideriq/mcp vs @spideriq/mcp-publish', 'kitchen-sink vs atomic MCP', 'why is the agent dropping tools?'. Almost always the answer is @spideriq/mcp-publish; the kitchen-sink @spideriq/mcp is only for cross-domain agents.

skills.title: @spideriq/cli Quick Reference
skills.summary: Run SpiderIQ from the terminal via @spideriq/cli — auth flow, project binding, pages CRUD, marketplace search, deploy, output formats. Same primitives as MCP, no IDE required, supports YAML/MD output for token-efficient agent loops.

skills.title: Install + Set Up the SpiderPublish IDE Extension
skills.summary: Install + bind the SpiderPublish IDE extension (SpiderIQ.spideriq-publish) in VSCode, Cursor, Antigravity, Windsurf. Three artifacts: install.md (extension + auth + project binding), pull-and-edit.md (working tenant content as files + native diff + stage), push-and-deploy.md (5-phase push pipeline + Deploy Site + link audit). The extension wraps @spideriq/mcp-publish (87 tools) as a child process — same primitives, click-driven instead of typed.
